summary: Four vessels were detected during the observation window across the monitored maritime zone. One vessel (VES-003) remained stationary near Sector 4 for approximately 72 seconds, which may indicate loitering behavior. Two vessels (VES-001, VES-002) were observed converging toward a common point with a closing gap of 45 meters.
anomalies_text: VES-003 has been flagged for sustained stationary positioning. VES-001 trajectory indicates potential restricted zone approach — currently 120m from boundary. Recommend continued monitoring of convergence pattern between VES-001 and VES-002.
recommendation: Maintain active tracking on all flagged vessels. Escalate VES-003 loitering alert if duration exceeds 120 seconds. Dispatch notification if VES-001 crosses within 50m of restricted boundary.
